pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.1.0 to support Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern reactive stacks.
Compiling with Java 11 settings on a Java 17 target JDK may result in missing language features or incorrect bytecode version if not explicitly set, though often handled by parent.
Older Surefire versions (2.x) have known compatibility issues with JUnit 5 and Java 17 module system.
Older Failsafe versions (2.x) have known compatibility issues with JUnit 5 and Java 17 module system.
Older provider versions are incompatible with newer JUnit Platform and Surefire 3.x.
Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 17 bytecode correctly.
Conflict with reactive stack; WebFlux is the intended runtime.
The standard OpenAPI UI starter is not compatible with WebFlux reactive stack; specific WebFlux UI starter is required.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit junit-platform-surefire-provider dependency from surefire plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Surefire 3.x manages JUnit platform integration internally; explicit provider dependency is obsolete and may cause conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit junit-platform-surefire-provider dependency from failsafe plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Failsafe 3.x manages JUnit platform integration internally; explicit provider dependency is obsolete and may cause conflicts.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Rename method to match updated API signature
src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.why_exists: Method findUserFractionNumeratorByFamilyName no longer exists or was renamed
